title: Hillshire Farm® Lit'l Smokies® Brand Launches Search for Celebration-Worthy Recipes to Feature at Lit'l Cocktail Lounge in New York City
text: In honor of the brand's 40th anniversary, fans can win a $3,000 cash prize and may have their recipe featured on the Lit'l Smokies Lit'l Cocktail Lounge menu in America's biggest city SPRINGDALE, Ark. , Oct. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- In celebration of its 40th anniversary, Hillshire Farm Lit'l Smokies Brand has teamed up with celebrity chef Kelsey Barnard Clark to kick off a recipe contest* challenging consumers to share their unique and innovative dishes featuring Lit'l Smokies cocktail links.

title: Tyson, one of the biggest meat producers, is investing in insect protein

title: Tyson Foods (TSN) & Protix to Build Insect Ingredient Facility
text: Tyson Foods (TSN) to acquire a minority stake in Protix through a direct equity investment. It will also form a joint venture with the latter to construct and operate an insect ingredient facility.

title: Tyson Foods joins insect protein rush using burger waste
text: Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN), one of the US's largest meat processing companies, is to invest in Protix International a specialist in insect ingredients. The deal will see Tyson take a direct minority stake in Protix as well as jointly building an insect ingredient facility, the first of its kind in the States.

title: Tyson Foods partners with insect ingredient maker Protix
text: Tyson Foods Inc. TSN, +1.83% said Tuesday it is planning to acquire a minority stake in Protix, a Dutch company that's a leader in insect ingredients, as it works on more sustainable protein production. Tyson did not disclose terms, but said it plans to fund Protix's global expansion.

title: Tyson Foods: Potential Cyclical Play For Long-Term Value Investors
text: Tyson's stock price has dropped by almost 50% from its highs, presenting a potential buying opportunity. Despite pressures from environmental activists, meat consumption in the US remains strong, benefiting Tyson's dominant market position. Tyson's competitors are also facing reduced profit margins, making this a common industry issue that is expected to subside in the long term.

title: Tyson Foods: Rated Hold As Dividend Yield Overshadowed By Net Losses
